name: Professor Laura Hammond
title: Professor of Development Studies

forced migration and diasporas. She is Challenge Leader for Security

research_interests: Laura Hammond is an anthropologist (Ph; D University of Wisconsin-Madison); her research interests include food security; conflict; forced migration and diasporas. She is Challenge Leader for Security; Protracted Conflict; Refugees and Forced Displacement for the Global Challenges Research Fund; Head of the London International Development Centre's Migration Leadership Team; and Team Leader for the Research and Evidence Facility (Horn of Africa Window) of the European Union Trust Fund for Africa
